articles.title: We're going to lose again at some point. Can we please not take a collective dump on LeBron/Luka/JJ/Rui/DeAndre, etc. when it happens?
articles.original_title: We're going to lose again at some point. Can we please not take a collective dump on LeBron/Luka/JJ/Rui/DeAndre, etc. when it happens?
articles.summary: I'm just tired of the mood swings, man. When shit is going good, the sub is filled with "we believe in you, Coach!" and "LBJ wasn't the problem after all" posts. And then, we look bad in one game and it's back to "Fire JJ" and "Ayton is cheeks", etc. Hell, even Rob (who I am not a fan of and I admit I have been a hater of his on this sub)-- let's just leave everyone alone for now and stay positive no matter what.  This Laker team has been awesome of late,

articles.title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo sidelined with hyperextended knee and bone bruise
articles.original_title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo sidelined with hyperextended knee and bone bruise
articles.summary: The Bucks said the two-time MVP had a hyperextended left knee and a bone bruise.  Antetokounmpo didn't play in the fourth quarter of Sunday's 134-123 win over the Pacers after landing awkwardly when he dunked late in the third period.  Antetokounmpo downplayed the injury after the game.

articles.title: Hockey Hall of Fame has Olympic artifacts. Jack Hughes wants his golden goal puck
articles.original_title: Hockey Hall of Fame has Olympic artifacts. Jack Hughes wants his golden goal puck
articles.summary: The Hockey Hall of Fame this week unveiled a new showcase of artifacts from the Milan Cortina Olympics, including the pucks scored by Jack Hughes to win gold for the U.S. men and Megan Keller for the U.S. women, each in overtime against Canada.  Hughes told ESPN on Tuesday that he wants the puck so he can give it to his father, Jim.  The New Jersey Devils center previously said when asked about the puck during other media appearances that had no idea where it was other than that it wasn't in his

articles.title: Ruling overturns Senegal's title at Africa Cup of Nations and declares Morocco the champion
articles.original_title: Ruling overturns Senegal's title at Africa Cup of Nations and declares Morocco the champion
articles.summary: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges who overturned Senegal’s victory in a chaotic final in January.  The Confederation of African Football said its appeals board ruled that Senegal is “declared to have forfeited the final” and its 1-0 win in extra time becomes a 3-0 default win for host nation Morocco.  In the Jan. 18 final in Rabat, Senegal players led by coach Pape Thiaw left the field in protest during stoppage time for 15 minutes — and
